title: Arabic Minecraft Title Logo
description: this pack change the logo of minecraft into arabic
body:
# 👑 Arabic Minecraft Title Logo

This simple, lightweight resource pack replaces the standard "Minecraft" title on the main menu with a custom-designed **Arabic logo: ماينكرافت**.

It is perfect for players who use the Arabic language setting and want a complete visual localization of the game's opening screen.

## ⚡ Recommended: The Complete Set
For the full, immersive Moroccan Minecraft experience, I strongly recommend using these 3 packs together:
* **Arabic Vanilla-Style Font:** [Arabic Vanilla-Style Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arabic-font)
* **Moroccan Darija Translation:** [Darija Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-in-moroccan-darija)
* **Arabic Title Logo:** [Arabic MINECRAFT LOGO](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arabic-logo)

## ✨ Features

* **Authentic Design:** The logo is custom-crafted to maintain the chunky, blocky feel of the original Minecraft logo.
* **Simple Install:** This pack only changes the title image and has no effect on gameplay or performance.

🔗 **Check out my site:** [bou33ou.com](https://bou33ou.com/)
Grab the latest updates and more Moroccan gaming stuff right here!
